label: professional_details
value: Registered nurse with an advanced wound care certification, eager to integrate new skills into daily responsibilities, now pursuing a BSN full-time with a scholarship, involved in a community health initiative requiring flexible hours, attended a regional nursing conference and enjoyed workshops on advanced patient care, interested in further hands-on learning experiences and upcoming workshops/seminars on patient care techniques

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Continues practicing yoga and meditation for stress management, maintains a flexitarian meal plan for energy levels

label: dietary_preferences
value: Recently decided to go vegetarian, enjoys cooking with more vegetables and legumes

label: miscellaneous_information
value: Interested in recent articles and books on medical technology and patient stories

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in strategies for effective time management, including prioritizing, planning, using time blocking, Pomodoro technique, delegating, collaborating, leveraging flexible hours, utilizing online resources, maintaining task lists, and using digital tools. Recommended apps and tools include Google Calendar, Trello, Asana, Microsoft Outlook, Todoist, Cozi Family Organizer, VolunteerMatch, ShiftPlanning, and Evernote for managing volunteer schedules alongside work and personal commitments.

label: important_personal_details
value: Hospital recently started offering fixed daytime shifts, providing more flexibility during evenings and weekends; looking to balance work and personal life better

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Interested in balancing work and personal life better, including participation in volunteer activities on weekends
